# Module Dependency Graph

Import relationships between all `src/` modules, with `utils` as the primary hub (fan-in 11).

```mermaid
flowchart LR
    subgraph lib["src/lib/"]
        utils["utils\n(482 LOC, hub)"]
        ansi["ansi"]
        hookFlags["hook-flags"]
        detect["detect"]
        manifest["manifest"]
        gitignore["gitignore"]
        projectDetect["project-detect"]
        pkgMgr["package-manager"]
        sessionAliases["session-aliases"]
        sessionMgr["session-manager"]
        smartMerge["smart-merge"]
        merge["merge"]
    end

    subgraph hooks["src/hooks/ (21 scripts)"]
        runWithFlags["run-with-flags"]
        sessionStart["session-start"]
        hooksUtils["8 hooks\n(console, cost, eval, ...)"]
        hooksSelf["10 self-contained hooks"]
    end

    subgraph standalone["src/ standalone"]
        orchestrator["install-orchestrator"]
        postinstall["postinstall"]
        setupPm["setup-package-manager"]
        skillCreate["skill-create-output"]
    end

    pkgMgr --> utils
    sessionAliases --> utils
    sessionMgr --> utils
    smartMerge --> ansi
    merge --> smartMerge
    merge --> ansi
    merge -.->|type only| manifest

    orchestrator --> detect
    orchestrator --> manifest
    orchestrator --> merge
    orchestrator --> gitignore
    postinstall --> ansi
    setupPm --> pkgMgr
    skillCreate --> ansi

    runWithFlags --> hookFlags
    sessionStart --> utils
    sessionStart --> pkgMgr
    sessionStart --> projectDetect
    sessionStart --> sessionAliases
    hooksUtils --> utils
```
